name: Trellis.2 GGUF
description: Aero-Ex Trellis.2 — GGUF quantized image-to-3D model (1–3 B params). Initial clean rebuild slice supports geometry-only mesh generation via sparse structure + shape SLaT. Requires ~6–10 GB VRAM depending on quantization.
author: Lightning Pixel

params_schema.label: Quality
params_schema.tooltip: Resolution and number of cascade steps. Higher = better detail, slower.

params_schema.label: GGUF Quantization
params_schema.tooltip: GGUF quantization level. Less VRAM = slightly less accurate.

params_schema.label: Sparse Steps
params_schema.tooltip: Diffusion steps for the sparse structure (coarse geometry). More = better quality, slower.

params_schema.label: Shape Steps
params_schema.tooltip: Diffusion steps for the geometry SLaT (fine details).

params_schema.label: Foreground Ratio
params_schema.tooltip: Proportion of the canvas occupied by the subject after background removal.
